programs.name: Back-Safe Strength Foundation
programs.description: 10-week machine-based strength program for James, designed around his L4-L5 disc herniation and hypertension. No axial loading — all lower body through leg press. Breathing cues on every set. Progressive overload every 2 sessions.

program_json.summary: A 10-week spine-safe strength program for James built entirely on selectorized machines and cable work. Systematically increases leg press from 175 lbs to a 220 lb milestone, while developing upper body pulling strength and core stability. All breathing cues are baked into each session to manage his hypertension safely.
